news.headline: Microsoft Azure AI revenue surges 33% as enterprise adoption accelerates
news.summary: Microsoft reported Azure cloud segment growth driven by AI workloads. Enterprise customers are signing multi-year contracts for Copilot and OpenAI integrations.

news.headline: Apple Intelligence rollout expands to EU markets after regulatory clearance
news.summary: Apple received DMA compliance clearance enabling full Apple Intelligence deployment in Europe. On-device AI features now available to 450M EU iPhone users.

news.headline: ECB holds rates steady, signals two cuts in H2 2026 as inflation eases
news.summary: The European Central Bank kept rates at 2.50% citing easing inflation. Markets price 50bps of cuts by year-end, boosting European bank NIM outlook.

news.headline: NVIDIA Blackwell GPU supply constraints ease, hyperscalers resume capex expansion
news.summary: Supply chain data shows NVIDIA Blackwell production ramp normalizing. AWS, Azure and Google Cloud confirmed accelerated GPU infrastructure buildout for H2 2026.

news.headline: UniCredit raises FY2026 net profit guidance to €10.5bn on strong trading income
news.summary: UniCredit upgraded full-year guidance above consensus driven by capital markets activity and Eastern European retail banking growth. CET1 ratio remains at 16.2%.

news.headline: EU AI Act enforcement begins: enterprise compliance spending to reach €12bn
news.summary: With EU AI Act provisions entering force, enterprises face mandatory conformity assessments for high-risk AI systems. Technology vendors positioning as compliance enablers.

news.headline: Semiconductor equipment orders hit record Q2 2026 as TSMC N2 ramp accelerates
news.summary: SEMI data shows wafer fab equipment bookings at record levels. TSMC N2 node volume production driving demand for ASML EUV systems and Applied Materials deposition tools.

news.headline: Investment banking M&A pipeline strongest since 2021 as PE deployment resumes
news.summary: Global M&A advisory fees up 28% YoY with technology and financial services leading deal volumes. Private equity firms accelerating exits after two years of restricted activity.

news.headline: Microsoft Azure OpenAI Service adds real-time reasoning models for enterprise
news.summary: Microsoft announced general availability of o3 reasoning model on Azure. Early adopters in financial services report 40% reduction in analysis workflow time.

news.headline: European banking sector buybacks accelerate as ECB removes capital buffer requirements
news.summary: ECB removed remaining countercyclical capital buffer requirements for EU banks. Analysts expect €30bn in additional shareholder returns across European banking sector in 2026.

themes.title: AI Infrastructure & Enterprise Adoption
themes.why_now: Hyperscaler capex recovery and EU AI Act compliance spending create simultaneous demand-pull for AI infrastructure hardware and enterprise software platforms.

themes.title: European Banking Capital Returns
themes.why_now: ECB rate cut trajectory combined with removal of capital buffers enables record shareholder returns from European banks trading at deep discounts to US peers.

themes.title: Semiconductor Supercycle — Advanced Node Ramp
themes.why_now: TSMC N2 production ramp and Blackwell supply normalization mark the beginning of the next semiconductor capex cycle with equipment makers as primary beneficiaries.
